title: Kaathal Kasakuthaiya Lyrics Aanpaavam

adikkum

neeyaaga pen thaeda koodaathu

vara vara kaadhal
kasakkuthaiyaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaathal Kasakuthaiya?

The song explores the complexities and emotions of love, capturing its bittersweet nature.

Who composed the music for Aan Paavam?

The music for Aan Paavam was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

What is the release year of Aan Paavam?

The movie Aan Paavam was released in 1985.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kaathal Kasakuthaiya?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kaathal Kasakuthaiya is a beautiful melody from the film Aan Paavam, released in 1985. The song, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, delves into the nuances of love, portraying its sweet and bitter moments. With lyrics by Vaali, it captures the essence of romance, making it a favorite for lovers and nostalgic listeners alike. The song evokes emotions of longing and affection, resonating deeply with its audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kaathal Kasakuthaiya from the classic film Aan Paavam. This enchanting melody, crafted by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, captures the essence of love with its soulful tune and heartfelt lyrics. Dive into a nostalgic journey where romance meets musical brilliance.
stanzaMeanings: As time goes by, love becomes bitter.
The heart keeps saying love, it beats for love, if it fails, it drinks, and madness catches on.
As time goes by, love becomes bitter.
Someone loved, someone loved, but nothing worked out, life is never always happy.
If a love movie is made, it will run. People will gather in the theater.
Listen to the story of the gods, Parvati, Ambika, and Amravati. In the end, they either unite or die.
As time goes by, love becomes bitter.
The heart keeps saying love, it beats for love, if it fails, it drinks, and madness catches on.
As time goes by, love becomes bitter.
How many movies, how many dramas have been watched, how many duets, how many tunes have been heard.
After hearing so many songs, what happened? Lost wisdom and strength, standing still.
Back then, there was untouched wilderness. When PU came, love was sweet. Manmatha's play in MKT's time.
This is the style of our acting legend.
Hello, hello, are you well? Yes, are you well? We also asked here, like MGR's songs.
For the love that today's youth do, Ilaiyaraja's songs are there.
Sing it at home, love your wife, respect your father's and mother's words, don't search for another woman.
As time goes by, love becomes bitter.
The heart keeps saying love, it beats for love, if it fails, it drinks, and madness catches on.
